================================================================================
                    IMOBI CI/CD SETUP - DEPLOYMENT SUMMARY
================================================================================

DATE CONFIGURED: 2026-05-30
BRANCH: claude/happy-goldberg-AFQPj
STACK: Turborepo + pnpm + Node 22.x

================================================================================
                              FILES CREATED (8)
================================================================================

GITHUB ACTIONS WORKFLOWS (3):
  1. .github/workflows/type-check.yml
     - Trigger: push + pull_request
     - Command: pnpm type-check
     - Purpose: TypeScript validation
     
  2. .github/workflows/build.yml
     - Trigger: push + pull_request
     - Command: pnpm build
     - Purpose: Build validation + artifact storage
     - Cache: pnpm node_modules
     
  3. .github/workflows/security-audit.yml
     - Trigger: Weekly (Thursday 02:00 UTC) + manual
     - Command: pnpm audit
     - Purpose: Security vulnerability detection
     - Auto-creates GitHub issues on vulnerabilities

CONFIGURATION FILES (2):
  4. .github/dependabot.yml
     - NPM: Auto-merge patch/minor weekly (Monday 03:00 UTC)
     - Docker: Weekly updates (Monday 04:00 UTC)
     - GitHub Actions: Weekly updates + auto-merge (Monday 05:00 UTC)
     - Limit: 5 open PRs (npm), 3 open PRs (docker+actions)
     
  5. .github/pull_request_template.md
     - Auto-applied to all new PRs
     - Checklist: type-check, build, security, tests
     - Requires: clear description of changes

GIT HOOKS (2):
  6. scripts/pre-push.sh
     - Runs type-check before push
     - Prevents TypeScript errors from being committed
     - Executable: chmod +x (already applied)
     
  7. scripts/setup-hooks.sh
     - Installer script for Git hooks
     - Run once: ./scripts/setup-hooks.sh
     - Executable: chmod +x (already applied)

DOCUMENTATION (3 files, not for commit):
  8. .github/WORKFLOWS.md
     - Complete workflow documentation
     - Troubleshooting guide
     - Performance tips
     
  9. .github/SETUP_CHECKLIST.md
     - Step-by-step setup instructions
     - GitHub repository configuration
     - Verification steps
     
  10. .github/DEPLOYMENT_SUMMARY.txt
      - This file
      - Quick reference summary

================================================================================
                          QUICK START GUIDE
================================================================================

STEP 1: Enable GitHub Settings (5 minutes)
-------
1. Repository Settings > Actions > General
   > Select "Allow all actions and reusable workflows"
   
2. Repository Settings > Code security and analysis
   > Enable: Dependabot alerts, security updates, dependency graph
   
3. Repository Settings > General > Pull Requests
   > Enable "Allow auto-merge"
   
4. Repository Settings > Actions > General > Workflow permissions
   > Select "Read and write permissions"

STEP 2: Local Setup (2 minutes)
-------
./scripts/setup-hooks.sh

STEP 3: Test Locally (3 minutes)
-------
./scripts/pre-push.sh    # Should pass
pnpm type-check          # Should pass
pnpm build               # Should pass
pnpm audit               # View any vulnerabilities

STEP 4: Commit & Push (2 minutes)
-------
git add .github/ scripts/
git commit -m "ci: configure github actions and dependabot"
git push origin claude/happy-goldberg-AFQPj

STEP 5: Create Pull Request
-------
Go to GitHub > Create PR > Workflows should run automatically

TOTAL SETUP TIME: ~15 minutes

================================================================================
                        WORKFLOW SCHEDULE
================================================================================

TYPE CHECK:
  - Trigger: Every push + pull request
  - Duration: ~2-3 minutes
  - Branches: main, develop, claude/*

BUILD:
  - Trigger: Every push + pull request
  - Duration: ~5-10 minutes (depends on packages)
  - Branches: main, develop, claude/*
  - Cache: Enabled (pnpm)

SECURITY AUDIT:
  - Trigger: Weekly Thursday 02:00 UTC
  - Duration: ~2 minutes
  - Manual trigger: Actions tab > Security Audit > Run workflow

DEPENDABOT:
  - NPM: Monday 03:00 UTC (weekly)
  - Docker: Monday 04:00 UTC (weekly)
  - GitHub Actions: Monday 05:00 UTC (weekly)
  - Auto-merge: After status checks pass

GIT PRE-PUSH HOOK:
  - Trigger: Before every git push
  - Duration: ~2 minutes (type-check only)
  - Can bypass: git push --no-verify (not recommended)

================================================================================
                      BRANCHES CONFIGURED
================================================================================

Workflows run on:
  - main (production)
  - develop (staging)
  - claude/* (feature branches - for current development)

Add more branches by editing:
  - .github/workflows/type-check.yml
  - .github/workflows/build.yml
  - .github/workflows/security-audit.yml

================================================================================
                        STATUS & MONITORING
================================================================================

VIEW WORKFLOWS:
  GitHub repository > Actions tab
  - Shows all runs
  - Click workflow name to see history
  - Click run to see detailed logs

VIEW DEPENDABOT:
  GitHub repository > Settings > Code security and analysis > Dependabot alerts
  Shows:
  - Active vulnerabilities
  - Dependabot PRs
  - Update history

VIEW ARTIFACTS:
  GitHub repository > Actions > Workflow > Run
  - Build artifacts stored for 5 days
  - Audit reports stored for 30 days

VIEW GIT HOOKS:
  .git/hooks/pre-push (local only, not committed)

================================================================================
                         TROUBLESHOOTING
================================================================================

WORKFLOWS NOT SHOWING UP:
  - Wait 5 minutes for GitHub to detect files
  - Push to main/develop/claude/* branch
  - Check Settings > Actions > General is enabled
  - Verify YAML syntax (use yaml linter online)

DEPENDABOT NOT CREATING PRS:
  - Verify Settings > Code security and analysis > Dependabot is ON
  - Check if repo is public or Pro
  - Wait 24-48 hours for first run
  - Check Dependabot alerts for errors

PRE-PUSH HOOK NOT WORKING:
  - Verify: ls -la .git/hooks/pre-push (should exist and be executable)
  - Re-install: ./scripts/setup-hooks.sh
  - Manual test: ./scripts/pre-push.sh

AUTO-MERGE NOT WORKING:
  - Verify Settings > General > Pull Requests > Allow auto-merge is ON
  - Check PR has all green status checks
  - Verify Dependabot has write permissions (Settings > Actions > General)
  - Check PR doesn't have merge conflicts

================================================================================
                        IMPORTANT NOTES
================================================================================

1. PRE-PUSH HOOK
   - Only runs locally before push
   - Requires ./scripts/setup-hooks.sh to install
   - Each developer must run this command once

2. DEPENDABOT
   - Requires GitHub repository settings to be configured
   - Only works on public repos or Pro/Team plans
   - First run takes 24-48 hours after enabling

3. AUTO-MERGE
   - Requires Settings > General > Pull Requests > Allow auto-merge
   - Only merges when all checks pass
   - Merges patch/minor versions automatically

4. SECURITY AUDIT
   - Runs weekly (Thursday 02:00 UTC)
   - Creates GitHub issues if vulnerabilities found
   - Can be triggered manually anytime

5. BRANCH COVERAGE
   - Currently set for: main, develop, claude/*
   - Production: main
   - Staging: develop
   - Development: claude/* (current)

================================================================================
                          FILES NOT COMMITTED
================================================================================

.git/hooks/pre-push (created by setup-hooks.sh)
  - Local only (not in repository)
  - Each developer must run ./scripts/setup-hooks.sh
  - .gitignore already ignores .git/ folder

================================================================================
                            NEXT STEPS
================================================================================

IMMEDIATE (Do this now):
  [ ] Read .github/SETUP_CHECKLIST.md
  [ ] Review .github/WORKFLOWS.md
  [ ] Run ./scripts/setup-hooks.sh locally

BEFORE PUSHING (Do before committing):
  [ ] Test: ./scripts/pre-push.sh
  [ ] Test: pnpm type-check
  [ ] Test: pnpm build

AFTER PUSHING (Do after merge to main/develop):
  [ ] Go to GitHub > Settings > Actions > General
  [ ] Go to GitHub > Settings > Code security and analysis
  [ ] Enable Dependabot features
  [ ] Monitor Actions tab for workflow runs

24-48 HOURS LATER:
  [ ] Dependabot should create first PRs
  [ ] Monitor Security Audit issue creation
  [ ] Verify auto-merge is working

All 6 CI/CD automation files have been created and are ready to commit.
No files committed yet - ready for user to push when appropriate.
